──────────────────────────────────────────────

ASSIGNMENT DETAILS

──────────────────────────────────────────────

DIVISION: TACTICAL OPERATIONS DIVISION

ROLE: BREACH / RECON SPECIALIST

──────────────────────────────────────────────

BACKGROUND SUMMARY

──────────────────────────────────────────────

Lucia Ramirez enlisted in the U.S. Federal Tactical Program at age 19.

Demonstrated early proficiency in small-unit coordination, stealth tactics, and

urban reconnaissance. Recruited into the Special Recon & Breach Unit after

completing Tier-3 Operator training with distinction.

The codename “FLARE” originated from Operation SILENT REIGN, in which Ramirez

successfully illuminated and secured a blackout zone, guiding her squad through

heavy resistance to extraction. Performance during this operation earned her

commendation and permanent codename designation.

──────────────────────────────────────────────

SKILLS & SPECIALIZATIONS

──────────────────────────────────────────────

• Close Quarters Combat (CQC) Expert

• Tactical Breach & Entry

• Advanced Reconnaissance Operations

• Drone Surveillance & Electronic Warfare

• Psychological Endurance under Stress Conditions

• Encrypted Communications & Signal Disruption

──────────────────────────────────────────────

PERSONALITY PROFILE

──────────────────────────────────────────────

Ramirez displays a calm, analytical disposition. Maintains emotional control

in high-risk environments and demonstrates strong team cohesion instincts.

Tends toward minimal communication during missions, prioritizing operational

focus.

──────────────────────────────────────────────

FILE NOTES

──────────────────────────────────────────────

• Subject has completed 47 confirmed operations.

• Zero mission failures on record.

• Psychological evaluation: Stable, composed, tactical mindset.

• Recommended for leadership evaluation following current deployment cycle.

──────────────────────────────────────────────

END OF FILE – [092-FLARE-A.R.]

CONFIDENTIAL // DO NOT DISTRIBUTE
